title: Rocket Lab Awarded $30 Million Contract for HASTE Hypersonic Rocket Launches for Anduril
text: Rocket Lab was selected by defense technology company Anduril Industries for multiple hypersonic test flights with its HASTE launch vehicle. The multi-launch contract includes three HASTE hypersonic test launches that will take place from Rocket Lab Launch Complex 2 in Virginia. This contract is valued at $30 million and represents additional momentum for Rocket Lab's defense and national security initiatives. The selection reinforces Rocket Lab's position as a critical provider of hypersonic testing capabilities for the U.S. Department of Defense and advanced technology companies developing next-generation defense systems.
